flow-definition.description: Download the current PIC-SURE Visualization template file (.tftpl) from S3, falling back to the infrastructure repo version.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: INFRASTRUCTURE_GIT_HASH
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Git hash of the infrastructure repo to checkout (used for fallback template). Leave empty to use the value from the release control build-spec.json.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: TARGET_STACK
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Target stack identifier (e.g., a, b). Leave empty to download from the shared template path.
